payload.summary: Saif has been involved in freight-tech startups where he launched new solutions and…
payload.headline: Senior Product Manager | Ocean Freight | Logistics | Product Management | Ex-Founder in the Freightech space
payload.icp_source: Product Managers and Technical Product Owners at SaaS companies with 25-250 employees in Canada and United Kingdom
payload.companyDescription: TEG is the logistics collaboration platform for enterprise. 3PLs and LSPs use the TEG platform to collaborate with internal and external carriers, unlocking efficiency, sustainability and resilience benefits.
payload.9b6f458e-6dc5-4762-83d5-a528aedd2235_ema:
Saif - TEG’s rebrand signals a big integration push across logistics workflows and fintech features. 

We help product teams deliver scalable API integrations faster without extra engineering overhead. 

Can I share a quick example of how another logistics SaaS sped up partner onboarding with us? 

If this isn’t on your radar, just let me know and I won’t follow up. 

Best, 
{{sendingAccountFirstName}} 

{{accountSignature}}

Saif,

TEG’s move to unify logistics and fintech means your integrations must keep pace with many partners and data sources.

I’ve seen teams cut integration time dramatically with a flexible API platform like ours.

Sound relevant for you?

If now’s not ideal, no worries at all - just say the word.

Cheers, 
{{sendingAccountFirstName}}

{{accountSignature}}

Hey Saif,

Nango lets product teams like yours build and manage 800+ API integrations fast, cutting manual work and syncing real-time logistics data securely.

Should I map out how this would work for TEG?

No pressure if the timing isn’t right - just let me know.

Regards, 
{{sendingAccountFirstName}}

{{accountSignature}}

headers.content-security-policy-report-only: default-src 'self' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://connect.nango.dev;child-src 'self';connect-src 'self' https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.sentry.io https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev wss://api.nango.dev/ https://connect.nango.dev https://*.posthog.com https://*.stripe.com https://*.plain.com wss://*.plain.com;font-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com;frame-src 'self' https://accounts.google.com https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://connect.nango.dev https://www.youtube.com https://*.stripe.com;img-src 'self' data: https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.posthog.com https://img.logo.dev https://*.ytimg.com https://*.plain.com;manifest-src 'self';media-src 'self';object-src 'self';script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.stripe.com https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://apis.google.com https://*.posthog.com https://www.youtube.com https://chat.cdn-plain.com;style-src blob: 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.googleapis.com https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev;worker-src blob: 'self' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.googleapis.com https://*.posthog.com;base-uri 'self';form-action 'self';frame-ancestors 'self';script-src-attr 'none';upgrade-insecure-requests
headers.access-control-expose-headers: Authorization, Etag, Content-Type, Content-Length, X-Nango-Signature, X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset
